name: svelte-skills
description: Claude Code plugin marketplace for Svelte developers — agent discipline, frontend workflows, Svelte development, and Svelte 5 migration.

plugins.name: agent
plugins.description: AI coding agent discipline — research, planning, self-checks, and completion verification. Requires superpowers plugin.

plugins.name: frontend
plugins.description: Frontend development discipline — validation, pixel-perfect measurement, editing, code style, testing, migration baselines.

plugins.name: svelte-5
plugins.description: Svelte development workflows — component docs, code style, Storybook, testing with vitest-browser-svelte.

plugins.name: svelte-5-migration
plugins.description: Svelte 3/4 to 5 migration — phased workflow, pattern conversions, interop rules, known traps.

plugins.name: bonus
plugins.description: Optional hooks and skills — nogrep, formatter, discipline rules. Standalone, no dependencies.
